div.p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.Low transmission decision table in the Immunization CPG

tr.th: Client is not due for MCV1 Case 1
Client is not due for MCV1 Case 2
Client is not due for MCV1
Client is not due for MCV1 Guidance
Client is due for MCV1 Guidance
Client is not due for MCV2 Case 1
Client is not due for MCV2 Case 2
Client is not due for MCV2
Client is not due for MCV2 Guidance
Client is due for MCV2 Guidance
Measles primary series is complete Guidance

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.Low transmission decision table in the Immunization CPG

name.value: Client is not due for MCV1 Case 1
Client is not due for MCV1 Case 2
Client is not due for MCV1
Client is not due for MCV1 Guidance
Client is due for MCV1 Guidance
Client is not due for MCV2 Case 1
Client is not due for MCV2 Case 2
Client is not due for MCV2
Client is not due for MCV2 Guidance
Client is due for MCV2 Guidance
Measles primary series is complete Guidance
